props.query: The search string or array of strings to highlight within the text.
props.matches: Pre-computed match ranges as `[start, end]` pairs. Takes priority over **query** when provided and non-empty.
props.matchAll: When enabled, all occurrences of each query term are highlighted. When disabled, only the first occurrence of each term is highlighted. Has no effect when **matches** is provided.
props.color: Applies a theme or CSS color to highlighted matches. The background is derived by mixing this color with the theme's highlight opacity.
props.opacity: Overrides the background opacity of highlighted matches. Accepts only CSS `<percentage>` - use `30%` instead of `0.3`.
props.markClass: Additional CSS class(es) applied to each `<mark>` element wrapping a highlighted match.
